description: Mandatory review gates. Tasks matching a gate are auto-blocked until reviewed.

gates.description: Any user-visible output must be reviewed and simplified before release.
gates.block_message: User-facing output requires review before delivery.

gates.description: Any write operation touching Pipedrive or another CRM.
gates.block_message: CRM write operations require Bridge approval.

gates.description: Any outbound communication to email, Slack, WhatsApp, or similar.
gates.block_message: External messages require explicit human approval.

gates.description: High-risk tasks should not continue autonomously without a reviewer.
gates.block_message: High-risk tasks should be explicitly reviewed.

gates.description: Remote A2A delegation must be explicitly approved.
